suppress.notes: Suppressing false positive CVE-2020-8908 for Guava library. This vulnerability is related to temporary directory creation which is not applicable in our use case.
Suppressing CVE-2015-6420 for BouncyCastle library. This is a false positive as we are not using the vulnerable ECDSA signature verification functionality.
Suppressing CVE-2018-10237 for Guava library. False positive - vulnerability does not apply to our usage pattern.
